(1, 2).title: Passage
(1, 2).description:
A low, well-worn passage carved through damp stone. Scuffed flagstones and muddy ruts mark long use,
        and a steady drip rings faintly in the cool air. Pale mineral veins lace the walls where water once lingered,
        and faint, distant light filters in from farther chambers, throwing long, soft shadows that shift as you move.
        The scent is mineral and cold; the corridor feels older than the city above it, patient and quietly kept.

props.name: Scratched Tally
props.description: A cluster of deep scratches in the rock — too deliberate for accident.
props.idle_message: Something is scratched into the passage wall here.
props.discovery_message: scratches carved into the wall!
props.announce: Something is scratched into the passage wall here.
props.text: Three grouped scratches, then a long diagonal through them. Repeated three times. A tally, perhaps — or a boundary marker. The meaning is not recoverable, but the intention was.

(10, 2).title: Conclave
(10, 2).description:
The Conclave's chamber opens beneath a high, vaulted ceiling carved with concentric sigils.
        Smooth stone benches ring a low central dais, and deep grooves in the floor suggest ritual processions.
        Faded murals and bas-relief panels decorate the walls, their pigments muted by time. The air holds a
        persistent, dry scent of resin and stone dust, and shafts of reflected light pick out the worn edges of the carvings.

props.name: Ritual Stone Rack
props.description: A low rack of small shaped mineral rods, their tips darkened where they have been burned or resonated. Several still hold a faint, slow pulse of light. Jean can LIGHT one or PRAY here.
props.idle_message: A low stone rack of mineral rods stands near the dais.
props.discovery_message: a rack of glowing mineral rods!
props.announce: A low stone rack of mineral rods stands near the dais.

(1, 3).title: Passage
(1, 3).description:
This narrow tunnel narrows further on the far side, its ceiling rubbed smooth where travelers brushed past.
        Thin, trailing roots from above thread down and cling to damp seams in the stone. The floor is mixed slate and
        packed earth, and a faint cool draft speaks of a larger void ahead. Light here is patchy; the hush of the
        corridor makes even the smallest sound feel significant.

props.name: Dusty Satchel
props.description: A worn satchel of stiff, dried material propped in a niche cut into the passage wall. Whoever left it here has not returned.
props.idle_message: A stiff, dusty satchel rests in a wall niche.
props.discovery_message: a forgotten satchel tucked into the wall!
props.announce: A stiff, dusty satchel rests in a wall niche.

(9, 3).title: Conclave
(9, 3).description:
A side chamber opening from the main Conclave, this space holds shallow niches and a low stone plinth.
        Intricate floor sigils converge here, their edges worn smooth by feet and time. Frescoes reach up toward
        a darkened cornice where small, weathered reliefs sit in shadow. The stone smells faintly of oil and dust,
        and the chamber carries a reverent quiet that suggets careful upkeep.

props.name: Golemite Plinth
props.description: A low circular plinth of polished black stone at the chamber's center. Its surface is incised with converging sigils matching the floor. There is a shallow depression at the top, worn by the placement of something over a very long time. Jean can PRAY here.
props.idle_message: A low polished plinth stands at the center of the chamber.
props.discovery_message: a low polished plinth!
props.announce: A low polished plinth stands at the center of the chamber.

props.name: Conclave Niche
props.description: One of the shoulder-height niches holds a folded length of woven stone-fiber and, beneath it, a small sealed vessel.
props.idle_message: One of the wall niches holds a few stored objects.
props.discovery_message: items stored in one of the niches!
props.announce: One of the wall niches holds a few stored objects.

(10, 3).title: Conclave
(10, 3).description:
This inner hall of the Conclave is dominated by a broad mosaic set into the floor, its tesserae
        depicting concentric maps and abstract constellations meaningful to the Grondites. Pillared arches rise
        around the room and carry dim reflected light from openings above. The air is hushed and cool, and the
        polished stone of the walls picks out every footfall with a soft clarity.

props.name: Mosaic Border Text
props.description: The outer ring of the mosaic is bordered by a band of incised Golemite text, worn but legible in places.
props.idle_message: The mosaic's outer border carries an inscription.
props.discovery_message: an inscription borders the mosaic!
props.announce: The mosaic's outer border carries an inscription.
props.text: Jean can trace some of the border characters. He recognizes the symbol for 'depth' repeated at each cardinal point. Whatever the mosaic depicts, the border says: 'here is the depth of it.' Or possibly: 'here is what lies below.' The grammar is opaque.

(11, 3).title: Conclave
(11, 3).description:
An annex to the Conclave lined with narrow alcoves and hanging tapestries of woven stone-fiber.
        The tapestries soften echoes and carry patterns woven from mythic scenes; their colors have dulled with
        age but the weave remains tight. Low, inset shelves are carved into the walls and the entire space feels
        like a quiet antechamber for contemplation and slow footsteps.

props.name: Inset Shelf
props.description: A low, carved shelf runs along the east wall beneath the tapestries. Several objects rest on it, partially obscured.
props.idle_message: A carved shelf runs along one wall.
props.discovery_message: a carved shelf along one wall!
props.announce: A carved shelf runs along one wall.

(2, 4).title: Passage
(2, 4).description: A crossroads of worn corridors where several tunnels converge, the floor bearing the shallow grooves of heavy carts dragged through over generations. The stone is rubbed bright at shoulder height on both sides, left by hands seeking the wall in the dark. A stepped recess to one side holds the scorch marks of old lamp oil and a square of packed earth where something heavy rested long enough to flatten it. Cool eddies of air from each direction carry different temperatures — one passage is noticeably warmer.

props.name: Junction Lantern
props.description: An iron lantern fixed to a spike driven into the stone wall. The glass is old and slightly green-tinted; it throws a warmer, older light than the corridor lanterns Jean has seen.
props.idle_message: An iron lantern burns steadily at the junction.
props.discovery_message: a lantern burning at the junction!
props.announce: An iron lantern burns steadily at the junction.

(8, 4).title: Arcology
(8, 4).description: A vertical hive of carved living chambers stacks dwellings into the rock in close, terraced tiers. Each dwelling front is distinct; some have carved lintels, others raw stone. Narrow walkways connect levels via carved steps, and small bridges of stone link opposite walls. Large crystalline protrusions descend from the ceiling, their steady red glow pooling on the concourse floor in overlapping rings of warm color. The air smells of something mineral and what might be cooked food — something slow and dense.

(9, 4).title: Residences
(9, 4).description: A dense cluster of small doorways and stacked thresholds opens onto a short street. Each doorway is distinct: one lintel has a handprint pressed into wet stone and dried there; another has a small groove cut across the threshold. Passage is slow here; the floor is swept to grit-free clarity. A low trough of water runs the length of the lane, fed by a seam in the rock above.

props.name: Ledge Planter
props.description: A stacked stone ring on a doorway ledge holds dried mineral fiber. At the base of the planter, tucked below the fiber: a small object left there deliberately.
props.idle_message: A stone planter sits on a ledge above a doorway.
props.discovery_message: something hidden in a ledge planter!
props.announce: A stone planter sits on a ledge above a doorway.

(10, 4).title: Conclave
(10, 4).description: An outer terrace of the Conclave, open to a high internal court. The floor is arranged with shallow channels guiding condensation toward a broad central basin stained pale green at the waterline. The walls hold plaques incised with lineage marks and clan sigils; some plaques have a secondary mark cut through them at a diagonal. The terrace is spotless in a way that speaks of daily care.

(11, 4).title: Residences
(11, 4).description: Clustered residences press close along a narrow, sheltered lane carved into the stone. Low thresholds and carved lintels mark each doorway; woven ropes and weathered hooks hold cloth awnings and small trinkets on shallow ledges. Warm, reflected light from ceiling crystals pools on the swept floor, and the architecture leans inward, creating a string of private alcoves and tiny courtyards between homes.

props.name: Trinket Ledge
props.description: A narrow ledge between two doorways holds several small objects: a smooth stone disc, a twist of mineral fiber, a small sealed crock.
props.idle_message: A ledge between doors holds some small objects.
props.discovery_message: a ledge with some objects on it!
props.announce: A ledge between doors holds some small objects.

(12, 4).title: Ecumerium
(12, 4).description:
Beneath a high, vaulted ceiling the Ecumerium unfolds as a spacious arcade of stalls and low booths.
        Hanging banners and carved signboards swing from iron hooks, and rows of stone counters receive passing
        trade beneath skylights that catch stray light from upper chambers. The floor bears worn channels
        cut to manage runoff; the space smells faintly of spice resin and polished stone.

props.name: Street Lantern
props.description: An iron street lantern stands here. It is lit.
props.idle_message: A wrought iron street lantern stands here.
props.discovery_message: a street lantern!
props.announce: A wrought iron street lantern stands here.

props.name: Market Bell
props.description: A small metal bell hangs from a short iron hook; it looks like it can be RUNG to draw attention.
props.idle_message: A small bell hangs here, waiting to be rung.
props.discovery_message: a small bell mounted by a stall!
props.announce: A small bell hangs here, waiting to be rung.

props.name: Jambo's Tent
props.description: A tent is here with a hand-painted sign reading "Jambo Heals U."
props.idle_message: There is a tent entrance here with a sign reading "Jambo Heals U."
props.discovery_message: a tent!
props.announce: There is a tent entrance here with a sign reading "Jambo Heals U."

(3, 5).title: Passage
(3, 5).description: A broad conduit cut through living rock, this passage widens here into a short, humred corridor. Scuffs and shallow wheel grooves scatter across the packed floor; occasional niches have been carved into the wall for lamps or small offerings. Moisture beads along seams of the stone, and a faint, cool draft pushes along the corridor toward darker tunnels beyond.

props.name: Wall Niche
props.description: One of the carved niches in the wall holds a small, lidded stone box, unremarkable from a distance.
props.idle_message: A wall niche holds a small stone box.
props.discovery_message: a small lidded box in one of the wall niches!
props.announce: A wall niche holds a small stone box.

(4, 5).title: Passage
(4, 5).description:
This stretch of passage narrows where the rock bulges, forcing travelers into single file beneath
        a low, scalloped ceiling. The stone here is darker and holds a faint salt bloom, and thin roots hang
        in strands from small fissures. Patches of compacted earth suggest where travelers have paused; the
        hush of the tunnel feels like a held breath before the next opening.

(5, 5).title: GateWest
(5, 5).description: A seamless, monolithic wall rises here, its face cut and polished to an eerie smoothness. A faint outline of a gate is etched into the stone, rimmed with slow-draining channels and weathered glyphs. Drafts leak through tiny seams around the frame and carry the distant, muffled rhythms of the city. The sheer scale and lack of an obvious mechanism make the threshold feel deliberately forbidding.

props.name: Gate Surround Glyphs
props.description: The weathered glyphs rimming the gate frame — dense and interlocking, worn almost to suggestion.
props.idle_message: Dense glyphs ring the gate frame.
props.discovery_message: glyphs carved into the gate frame!
props.announce: Dense glyphs ring the gate frame.
props.text: The glyphs do not translate to anything Jean knows. Their geometry speaks of boundary and threshold. At the base of the right column, scratched over the carved surface in a cruder hand: a small human figure with a circle around it, crossed through. Jean stares at it for a moment.

(6, 5).title: Antechamber
(6, 5).description:
Angular planes of polished stone give this antechamber an unnatural, crafted order. Pink crystalline
        clusters hang like chandeliers and wash the room in a slow, pulsing light that throws long, soft shadows.
        Low benches and carved niches suggest a place of waiting or preparation; the air hums faintly with the
        crystals' resonance and the pattern of light seems to coax a steady, thoughtful pace from those who enter.

(7, 5).title: Arcology
(7, 5).description: A tiered arcade of dwellings rises on either side of a narrow concourse; terraces and carved ledges stack like honeycombs into the rock. Linen awnings and ropes bridge between openings, and narrow stairlets climb to upper tiers. The concourse breathes with the city's slow circulation, and the warm glow of embedded crystals bathes doorways in an amber cast. The concourse floor here carries a long row of small indentations at regular intervals — floor marks, perhaps for some procession or ceremony.

props.name: Floor Marks
props.description: A row of small, even indentations at shin height on the archway supports of the concourse.
props.idle_message: Small marks are set into the concourse archway supports.
props.discovery_message: small marks on the archway supports!
props.announce: Small marks are set into the concourse archway supports.
props.text: They're not decorative. The spacing is too regular, too deliberate — evenly spaced, one mark per archway at a consistent height. Jean can't tell if they're counting something in, or counting something out.

(8, 5).title: Arcology
(8, 5).description: The arcology opens into a slightly broader tier at this level, where stone bridges span opposite ledges. Carved gutters collect scant runoff and channel it toward recessed basins darkened with mineral residue. Doorways are set into the rock in uneven rows, each with its mark or tally; the sound of distant footfalls echoes from the twisting alleys between the stacked dwellings.

(9, 5).title: Arcology
(9, 5).description: A busier tier of the arcology where carved thresholds open onto a tighter weave of alleys. Small stone platforms serve as outdoor work surfaces, several currently occupied. Narrow railings of braided iron keep passersby from steep drops; and the glow from clustered crystals above throws the concourse into alternating bands of light and shadow.

props.name: Work Platform
props.description: One of the stone platforms used as an outdoor work surface. A few items left from a recent task lie on it.
props.idle_message: A stone work platform sits here, recently used.
props.discovery_message: a work platform with items on it!
props.announce: A stone work platform sits here, recently used.

(10, 5).title: Citadel
(10, 5).description: The Citadel's outer forecourt opens into a solemn, orderly space of polished stone and raised platforms. Banners and carved reliefs mark clan houses and their histories in a visual language Jean cannot read. A broad stair leads upward. The air here feels intentionally controlled; water-swept channels and carefully placed braziers regulate scent and humidity. Every surface has been worked to a standard.

props.name: Citadel Relief
props.description: A carved relief panel beside the entrance stair, depicting a procession of Grondite figures in low relief.
props.idle_message: A carved relief panel flanks the entrance stair.
props.discovery_message: a carved relief beside the stair!
props.announce: A carved relief panel flanks the entrance stair.
props.text: The figures are in procession, each carrying something different: a stone block, a jar, a length of chain, an empty tray. The rear of the procession is unfinished — the carver stopped partway through the last figure, leaving it featureless. Intentional or interrupted, Jean cannot say.

(11, 5).title: Ecumerium
(11, 5).description: A broad arcade opens beneath a high, ribbed vault. Long stone counters run in ordered rows, their surfaces smoothed by generations of trade; iron hooks and signboards hang from low beams, marking booths and guild spaces. Light filters through clerestory slits, pooling in shallow channels cut to gather runoff. The air smells faintly of spice resin and warm stone.

props.name: Arcade Lantern
props.description: An iron lantern on a post at the arcade entrance. It is lit, throwing a working warmth across the stone counters.
props.idle_message: An iron lantern on a post stands at the arcade entrance.
props.discovery_message: a lantern at the arcade entrance!
props.announce: An iron lantern on a post stands at the arcade entrance.

(12, 5).title: Ecumerium
(12, 5).description:
This stretch of the Ecumerium widens into a market courtyard beneath a vaulted ceiling carved
        with clan emblems. Low booths and counters are arranged around a central drainage channel, and
        tapestries fastened to iron rings damp the echoes. Lantern racks hang from stout posts, their
        brackets blackened by long use. The floor is swept but stained where water and trade have left
        their marks; the arcade feels like a deliberate meeting place for merchants and visitors alike.

props.name: Fountain
props.description: A low circular fountain murmurs softly; clear water bubbles up and spills over carved stone. You could probably DRINK from it or just LISTEN to the water.
props.idle_message: A small stone fountain murmurs here.
props.discovery_message: a murmuring fountain!
props.announce: A small stone fountain murmurs here.

props.name: Market Bell
props.description: A small metal bell hangs from a short iron hook; it looks like it can be RUNG to draw attention.
props.idle_message: A small bell hangs here, waiting to be rung.
props.discovery_message: a small bell mounted by a stall!
props.announce: A small bell hangs here, waiting to be rung.

props.name: Market Gong
props.description: A wide bronze gong is suspended from a stout frame. A padded mallet invites someone to STRIKE it.
props.idle_message: A bronze gong hangs here, silent.
props.discovery_message: a large bronze gong!
props.announce: A bronze gong hangs here, silent.

props.name: Notice Board
props.description: A wooden notice board stands here with a scattering of parchment scraps pinned to it.
props.idle_message: A wooden notice board is here.
props.discovery_message: a notice board!
props.announce: A wooden notice board is here.
notes: This note appears to be from a human merchant: 'Mattress for sale. Lightly used. Extremely firm - high quality stone.'
A note written in the odd chalky scratches of the Golemite language: 'I<ou][]|.._|-__=' (and so on.)

(13, 5).title: Ecumerium
(13, 5).description: A row of recessed stalls lines this side of the Ecumerium, each set beneath a carved lintel. Stone counters are inset with small basins to catch drips, and hinged shutters fold into the walls when empty. Painted plaques above each stall show faded emblems; many have been repainted over time. The space carries the constant low murmur of commerce and the creak of ropes and shutters.

props.name: Market Stall
props.description: An open stall counter with several items laid out on a cloth. No attendant is present.
props.idle_message: An open market stall counter holds some goods.
props.discovery_message: an open market stall!
props.announce: An open market stall counter holds some goods.

(14, 5).title: Antechamber
(14, 5).description:
A compact antechamber with sharply faceted walls, more angular than the rough caverns nearby.
        Pink crystalline clusters hang from the ceiling like sculpted lamps, their slow pulses bathing the
        room in a soft, cyclical glow. Carved benches line the walls and a low stone table sits in the center,
        its surface smoothed by hands and time. The space feels deliberate and domestic, an interior pause
        between the city and the private quarters that open from it.

props.name: Low Stone Table
props.description: A flat stone table at the room's center, its surface worn smooth. On it: the remains of something stored — a ring of faint residue where a vessel stood, and a small fold of woven fiber.
props.idle_message: A low stone table sits in the center of the room.
props.discovery_message: a low stone table!
props.announce: A low stone table sits in the center of the room.

(15, 5).title: GateEast
(15, 5).description: A broad, featureless wall rises here and a rough path curls away to the east. The gate set into the stone is suggested only by a faint seam and weathered grooves; no visible mechanism exists. Narrow drainage channels trace the base of the wall and a shallow step leads up to the framed arch. The monumentality of the barrier and the absence of a handle mark it as a threshold meant for the Grondites' larger designs rather than casual passage.

(8, 6).title: Arcology
(8, 6).description:
The arcology here widens into a bustling spine where terraces step up in tight tiers. Narrow
        bridges of carved stone connect opposite ledges; iron rings and ropes secure small awnings above
        doorways. The concourse narrows and widens rhythmically, creating pockets of shadow and light where
        residents might pause. Embedded crystals inset in the walls cast a steady, warm radiance that softens
        the roughness of the carved stonework.

(9, 6).title: Residences
(9, 6).description: Narrow thresholds open from a confined lane into a cluster of modest homes. Carved lintels and patched stonework speak of continuous repair and practical care. Small ledges project from the walls where offerings or tools might rest; a low drain runs the length of the lane. The area feels private and sheltered, a quieter backstreet removed from the main concourse.

(10, 6).title: Fabricarium
(10, 6).description: The Fabricarium's working floor opens into a cross-cut gallery of workshops. Heavy stone benches and low tool racks line the walls; the floors bear dark smears of metal dust and polishing compound. Venting channels rise toward high flues to carry away heat and stone dust. Iron supports brace the carved roof where pulley blocks and rope runs transmit force between floors. The smell is warm metal and something older, like the stone itself has been worked for so long it has its own scent.

props.name: Tool Rack
props.description: A low rack fixed to the workshop wall, holding tools and a few spent materials.
props.idle_message: A tool rack is mounted to the workshop wall.
props.discovery_message: a workshop tool rack!
props.announce: A tool rack is mounted to the workshop wall.

(11, 6).title: Residences
(11, 6).description: A stepped courtyard opens between a row of residences, its floor worn smooth by foot traffic. Low stone seats and shallow basins are set into the perimeter walls; narrow stairlets lead to upper doors. Carved motifs over each entry mark family or craft affiliations — geometric symbols, repeated in different sizes as if the same thing has been restated across generations. The air is cooler here, shaded by overhanging terraces.

props.name: Doorway Motif
props.description: A carved geometric symbol above one of the doorways — repeated, with slight variations, above several others.
props.idle_message: Carved motifs mark the doorways here.
props.discovery_message: carved motifs above the doorways!
props.announce: Carved motifs mark the doorways here.
props.text: Not language. The same geometric symbol appears above each door in this courtyard, scaled differently each time: large above the widest threshold, small above the narrowest. Jean traces the smallest with his finger. The stone there is slightly deeper-cut than the others — the oldest mark, perhaps, and the one the others were scaled from.

(12, 6).title: Ecumerium
(12, 6).description: At this edge of the Ecumerium, stalls give way to a broader thoroughfare with carved pilasters and more elaborate signboards. Stone channels run along the center to collect runoff. Decorative reliefs depict merchant routes and distant caverns, and worn thresholds show where carts and pack carriers have passed. The space hums with movement, but its architecture keeps the flow deliberate.

(9, 7).title: Fabricarium
(9, 7).description: This chamber serves as a finishing floor where polished surfaces are brought to a mirror sheen. Low basins of water sit beside abrasive stones and leather pads; fine metallic dust coats the ledges and the backs of hands here. Overhead racks hold long-handled tools; wheeled trolleys rest against the walls loaded with finished components awaiting transfer.

props.name: Polishing Basin
props.description: A broad stone basin at the floor's edge, filled with cloudy mineral water. Several worked pieces are submerged. Two small pouches have been left on the lip of the basin.
props.idle_message: A broad polishing basin sits at the floor's edge.
props.discovery_message: a broad polishing basin!
props.announce: A broad polishing basin sits at the floor's edge.

(10, 7).title: Fabricarium
(10, 7).description: A network of workbenches and packing stations occupies this level, where shaped pieces are assembled into larger fittings. Crates and simple wooden carts stand ready along a clear aisle; pulley blocks descend from carved beams to lift heavy loads for transfer. The floor bears scuffs and wheel grooves from repeated traffic.

props.name: Packing Crate
props.description: A half-filled packing crate at a bench edge, its lid resting beside it. Whoever was packing it has stepped away.
props.idle_message: A half-filled packing crate sits at a bench edge.
props.discovery_message: a half-filled packing crate!
props.announce: A half-filled packing crate sits at a bench edge.

(11, 7).title: Fabricarium
(11, 7).description: A quality hall where measured jigs and templates mounted to the walls are used to check tolerances and alignment. Stone pedestals support sample pieces; small lamps are fixed overhead to reveal imperfections. Cross-vent channels carry away smoke from nearby ovens, and the tiled floor is scoured nightly to keep grit from marring finished surfaces.

props.name: Quality Record
props.description: A set of small incised marks covering a wall panel near the inspection jigs.
props.idle_message: A wall panel near the jigs is covered in small marks.
props.discovery_message: a quality record carved into a wall panel!
props.announce: A wall panel near the jigs is covered in small marks.
props.text: The marks form columns of counts beside symbols Jean recognizes as Golemite numerals. Most columns are clean. Two near the right edge carry a small mark beside them — something flagged, or noted differently. What they flag is unclear. The columns continue past Jean's eye level; whoever keeps this record has kept it for a long time.

(8, 8).title: Passage
(8, 8).description: A long, echoing passage linking deeper workshops to the arcology above. The ceiling sits low; the walls are scored with old tool marks, and rope rings and iron brackets are set into niches where lamps or banners might be affixed. Cool drafts sweep the corridor, carrying the mixed scents of stone and metal. Faint scratches in the floor trace the passage of trolleys and handcarts.

props.name: Handcart
props.description: A low-sided handcart parked against the wall. Its contents are covered with a cloth, but a corner has slipped loose.
props.idle_message: A handcart is parked against the passage wall.
props.discovery_message: a loaded handcart parked here!
props.announce: A handcart is parked against the passage wall.

(10, 8).title: Fabricarium
(10, 8).description: A storage and staging alcove where packed components await dispatch. Sturdy racks rise in rows, bearing crates and wrapped bundles secured with woven fiber. A shallow loading ramp gives access to a narrow service corridor; chalk marks on the beams record previous loads and destinations. The air here is drier, and the floor is kept swept to ease handling during busy transfer hours.

props.name: Dispatch Crate
props.description: A sealed crate at the back of the lowest rack. It has no chalk mark. It has not been claimed for dispatch.
props.idle_message: A sealed, unmarked crate sits at the back of the lowest rack.
props.discovery_message: a sealed, unmarked crate at the back of the rack!
props.announce: A sealed, unmarked crate sits at the back of the lowest rack.

(7, 9).title: GrondelithEntrance
(7, 9).description:
The chamber opens into a wide basin of mineral pools ringed by towering crystalline spires.
        Pools of clear, mineral-rich water sit in carved basins, reflecting fractured light across the walls.
        Fine, glittering detritus collects on shallow ledges and the air tastes faintly metallic, sharp and
        mineral. The constant, gentle tinkle of water and the resonant ring of shifting crystals fills the space
        with a slow, crystalline music.

props.name: Passage to the Mineral Pools
props.description: A descending passage carved into the southwest wall, leading toward the Grondelith Mineral Pools.
props.idle_message: A descending passage leads southwest toward the Grondelith Mineral Pools.
props.discovery_message: a descending passage!
props.announce: A descending passage leads southwest toward the Grondelith Mineral Pools.

(10, 9).title: Antechamber
(10, 9).description:
An intimate antechamber carved with neat, geometric niches and a low, central table of smoothed
        stone. Pale crystals embedded in the ceiling throw a diffuse light; the walls are incised with simple
        runes and maintenance marks rather than ornate imagery. A narrow shelf holds folded cloth and utility
        implements; the room feels like a quiet preparatory space between workings and private rooms beyond.

props.name: Maintenance Marks
props.description: Rows of small runes along the base of the east wall, incised in a careful, repetitive hand.
props.idle_message: Some runes are incised neatly along the wall's base.
props.discovery_message: careful runes at the base of the wall!
props.announce: Some runes are incised neatly along the wall's base.
props.text: Not scripture — inventory. The marks record quantities and dates in Golemite numerals. Some entries have a secondary mark through them: completed, presumably. The most recent entry is undated. The number beside it is large.

(10, 10).title: GateSouth
(10, 10).description: A massive, smooth wall extends to the north, its surface unmarred except for a faint seam that hints at a concealed threshold. The approach is punctuated by small, recessed pools that glow a pale blue and collect condensation from higher chambers. Heavy grooves and weathering at the base show where mechanisms were once housed; the absence of visible hardware suggests deliberate concealment in the original design and long, slow maintenance rather than frequent opening.

props.name: Gate Inscription
props.description: Characters incised low on the gate frame, almost at floor level.
props.idle_message: Something is carved near the base of the gate.
props.discovery_message: carvings near the base of the gate!
props.announce: Something is carved near the base of the gate.
props.text: Jean crouches to read it. The characters are old — older than the gate mechanism, by the look of the weathering. He can trace three of them: 'depth,' 'below,' and a third he has seen in the Conclave's floor sigils. Something about the carver's hand suggests urgency, or warning. Jean straightens slowly.
